channel.title: hacking on Have an average day :|
channel.description: Recent content in hacking on Have an average day :|

item.title: Pac-Man Hacked Onto a Touch-Screen Voting Machine Without Breaking "Tamper-Evident" Seals
item.description: There are just some things you want to be simply, plain, unexciting, and not “cheap”. Like backups, ammo, toilet paper, condoms, and voting machines. Pac-Man Hacked Onto a Touch-Screen Voting Machine Without Breaking “Tamper-Evident” Seals.
